headline: AES Buyout Scrutiny Puts Regulation And Clean Energy Story In Focus
summary: AES (NYSE:AES) is the target of a proposed $33b take private buyout led by BlackRock and EQT. Indiana's state treasurer and several lawmakers are raising concerns about potential impacts on customer utility bills and foreign ownership. The Indiana Utility Regulatory Commission has opened a formal inquiry into the deal and its implications for the clean energy transition. Advocacy groups are calling for closer federal scrutiny of the transaction's effect on grid reliability and local...
